info.title: navka
info.description: Navka Platform CLI - Build, test, deploy, and manage the Navka platform

commands.name: build
commands.description: Build the platform (dev) or Docker images (prod)

commands.name: api
commands.description: Start the API Gateway with hot reload

commands.name: platform
commands.description: Start entire platform via .NET Aspire (all services)

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update dependencies or the CLI itself

commands.name: self
commands.description: Update the navka CLI tool itself

commands.name: local
commands.description: Manage local Docker Swarm environment (infra + gateway + silo)

commands.name: up
commands.description: Deploy local infra, gateway, and silo (run portal/web with dotnet watch)

commands.name: watch
commands.description: Enable hot reload - auto-rebuild and restart on file changes

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Deploy to production Swarm via SSH

commands.name: prod
commands.description: Deploy to production Docker Swarm via SSH

commands.name: pipeline
commands.description: Run full CI/CD pipeline (detect → build → push → deploy)

commands.name: module
commands.description: Create a new module (backend + UI + protos)

commands.name: auth
commands.description: Authenticate the CLI with a Navka gateway

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start the AI runner as a background daemon

commands.name: register
commands.description: Register this machine as a runner and get an API key

commands.name: connect
commands.description: Start the runner connected to the gateway

commands.name: watch
commands.description: Watch for SRE bugs and auto-fix with Claude Code

arguments.name: key
arguments.description: Config key (sre-url, sre-key, repo-path, max-concurrent, auto-pr)
